name: Banana Split Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
Mix and pat into 10-inch springform pan, bottom and sides.
CAKE
2 lb CREAM CHEESE, removed from wrappers and warmed in microwave for 2 minutes on high.
5 JUMBO EGGS, removed from shell and warmed in microwave for 25 seconds.
1 cup SUGAR
3 tsp LEMON JUICE
1 cup SOUR CREAM
1 1/2 c BANANA, mashed
1/4 cup CORNSTARCH
1/2 cup HEAVY CREAM
Beat the cheese until light. Add sugar and beat again. Add eggs one at a time, beating after each. Stir in cream, sour cream, vanilla and cornstarch and blend well. Stir in banana.
Preheat oven to 350°F with pan of water on bottom of oven. Bake cake for 1 hour or so until edges firm and cake still
